name: fitplanner
description: FitPlanner monorepo for mobile workout planning, progress tracking, API and web dashboard.

scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @fitplanner/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @fitplanner/web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @fitplanner/api && npm run build -w @fitplanner/web
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test -w @fitplanner/api
